review_title: Very simple and cost effective security
description: Lockwell has become a very important tool in our product environment. We move quickly, deliver many times, and manage sensitive customer credentials on a daily basis. Security was just another system that we had to tape into workflows before Lockwell. Now it is all automated, predictable, and integrated into our Google Workspace without creating any obstacles for our team. The most important thing is visibility—now we finally can see all the risks in a nice dashboard across all accounts instead of just guessing what the situation is like behind the scenes. The support team is very quick to respond, very friendly, and very knowledgeable. If you are a small software company trying to keep your security tight without hiring a whole security team, then this is your tool.
author: Adrian V.
pros: Very easy to set up. Great value for the money. Service and support have been really easy to work with.
cons: I haven't experienced anything negative yet. Hopefully that continues to be the case. The service has been really good so far
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The Easiest Data Protection Tool We’ve Used
description: Being consultants, it is important for us to be credible. Our clients require us to be absolutely trustworthy in every aspect of data protection. Lockwell has enabled us to implement data security measures uniformly across our entire small team with remarkable ease and the initial process was smooth and the continuous monitoring is done quietly in the background without disrupting our operation. I value the way the Lockwell team communicates — no intimidation tactics, just plain advice. This is the least complicated security solution I have ever used, and it’s perfect for small consulting teams that depend a lot on Google Workspace. I love it!!!
author: Sarah W.
pros: I like how easy it was to set up across our team. The dashboard is clean, and everything we need is right where it should be.
cons: So far, everything has performed as expected... Hopefully the experience remains consistent and encounter no issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

For small businesses looking for an effective and easy-to-use solution, it’s your best bet.

cons: While Lockwell offers a range of impressive features, it falls short in one key area for me. The lack of a Chrome extension for its password manager. This omission means that accessing and managing passwords while browsing isn't as seamless as it could be.
